title: [codereview-P1] Missing ccp16-desync.json despite schema reference to v2 array root support
description: Schema and ccp_document explicitly reference ccp16-desync.json as v2 array-root example, but file does not exist in test/vectors/. This breaks completeness of v2 migration. Add the file with array of vectors or update schema to remove reference. Independent oracle: compare to similar v2 enveloped files. Parent: project-LICHEN-pgzj.1
close_reason: Added ccp16-desync.json (v2 enveloped with desync vectors matching ccp_vector schema extension). Updated schema for new fields, test_vectors.py param list, README table. All codereview findings (P1-P3 beads) fixed. 3 clean passes achieved (no remaining P0-P2). Schema and vector tests pass. Completes v2 array root prep for migration epic.
